_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Inter-board harness routing, connectors, assembly datums, connection types and load-path closure
physics_paths: harness_path: routing clips and harness_channel guide electrical signals from EPS board to OBC board
eps_board_slot: electrical signals from EPS board to harness
obc_board: electrical signals from harness to OBC board
assembly_datum: alignment for mounting to adjacent subsystems
service_hatch: human access for harness inspection and maintenance
inspection_checklist_marks: visual inspection points for harness integrity
integration_opportunities: harness_channel can be extended for future payload expansion
routing_clips can be adjusted for different harness sizes
service_hatch can be designed for tool-less access
